articles.title: Staying in a job for the health insurance? About 1 in 4 Americans do, a survey says - NPR
articles.description: About 24% of U.S. employees stay in unwanted jobs just for health insurance, a report out Wednesday finds. Up significantly since 2021, the uptick in "job lock" is a concerning sign for the U.S. economy.

articles.title: Trump Sets 100% Tariff on Generic Drugs With Two-Year Delay - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Generic drug manufacturers will have two years to move production to the US or face a 100% import duty from August 2028, President Donald Trump said, threatening the supply of low-cost medicines that millions of Americans rely on.
